aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite PureComfort Heating due to insufficient structured data and conversational content. They lack visibility in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC repair and installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, accurate hours, and a high rating, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair near me' and '24-hour AC service in Littleton'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating content that highlights certifications, expertise, and unique service offerings.

agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
